title: Chinas Coal Production Continues To Fare Much Better Than Coal Derived Electricity Generation Hydropower Output Has Set All Time High
section_path: Chinas Coal Production Continues To Fare Much Better Than Coal Derived Electricity Generation Hydropower Output Has Set All Time High
section_path_text: Chinas Coal Production Continues To Fare Much Better Than Coal Derived Electricity Generation Hydropower Output Has Set All Time High
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
China's coal production in June totaled 379.3 million tons. This has marked a month-on-month rise of 11.5 million tons (3%) and is up year-on-year by 56.1 million tons (17%). While again not setting a record (as was previously seen in March, December, November, and October), China's coal production has remained quite strong.
